query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.status, p.designerId, u.name as designerName 
FROM projects p 
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.designerId = u.id 
WHERE p.name LIKE '%Henry Morales%' OR p.name LIKE '%COT-2026-625%'
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, p.status, p.designerId, u.name as designerName 
FROM projects p 
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.designerId = u.id
